tasks.label: test: appserver unit (uv)
args: ${env:HOME}/.local/bin/uv sync --project appserver --locked --all-groups --managed-python && cd appserver && POSTGRES_HOST=localhost POSTGRES_PORT=5432 POSTGRES_USER=postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres POSTGRES_DB=postgres ${env:HOME}/.local/bin/uv run --project . pytest tests/unit/ -v

tasks.label: test: cache-invalidator (uv)
args: ${env:HOME}/.local/bin/uv sync --project cache-invalidator --locked --all-groups --managed-python && cd cache-invalidator && ${env:HOME}/.local/bin/uv run --project . pytest tests/ -v

tasks.label: test: statistical-enrichment (uv)
args: ${env:HOME}/.local/bin/uv sync --project statistical-enrichment --locked --all-groups --managed-python && cd statistical-enrichment && ${env:HOME}/.local/bin/uv run --project . pytest tests/ -v

tasks.label: test: client
args: cd client && if command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1; then yarn test; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack yarn test; else npm test; fi

tasks.label: client: install-deps
args: if command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1; then yarn install --frozen-lockfile; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack yarn install --frozen-lockfile; else npm install; fi

tasks.label: client: dev-start
args: if command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1; then yarn dev-start; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack yarn dev-start; else npm run dev-start; fi

background.endsPattern: Compiled successfully\.|Angular Live Development Server is listening
